<!-- Design language DL-08 SENTINEL token block -->

## Design language: SENTINEL (DL-08)

**Watch without distraction.** Latin tradition: Vigilance.

Status: candidate. Occasions: live dashboards, control-room screens, dark BI pages, monitoring walls.

### Design laws

- Constant visibility
- One highlighted watch metric
- Dark environments
- Fast scanning
- Low cognitive load

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | question-first |
| density | operational |
| annotation_policy | minimal |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | evidence-only |
| reading_time | glance |
| charts_per_page | 4 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#101418` |
| panel | `#1A2026` |
| ink | `#E6EDF3` |
| body | `#9FB0BE` |
| hairline | `#2A323A` |
| gridline | `#2A323A` |
| primary | `#F0B429` |
| muted | `#5C6B78` |
| benchmark | `#9FB0BE` |
| positive | `#3FB68B` |
| negative | `#E5534B` |
| info | `#58A6FF` |

### Fonts

- display: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 600
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
